Defendant City And County Of San Francisco Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar May-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Holly D. Coulehan, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendant City and County of San Francisco,
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion To Compel is granted. Dr. Ruff is directed to produce to the defendant's and plaintiff's attorneys all medical and mental health records of plaintiff, including therapy notes, that are in Dr. Ruff's possession, custody or control. The documents are to be produced within 10 days of service on Dr. Ruff of notice of entry of this order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Apr-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY HOLLY D. COULEHAN OF THE OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY (SF) TEL NO. 415-554-3800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING- DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: Greg Call; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported. =302/JPT.
